name: Method Classification review for Ssr Sparse Data Supplementation bundle
summary: Method-classification review found the generation methods and evaluation methods fit the staged evidence: GPT-4 minority-class generation, Coedit-XL paraphrase augmentation, GPT-3.5 paraphrase augmentation, GPT-4/GPT-4o essay generation, CASE corruption-based essay augmentation, and Wolfe/Barber prompt-strategy calibration are all classified distinctly. Martin and Graulich is appropriately marked as not fully extracted for exact model and prompt details, so no method-classification blocker remains.
